ID: Sp10(14):604-632+Sp10(15):100-111+Sp8(5)_rescue_C
Genes: C1 C2 C3 C4 C5 C6 C7 C8 C9 C10 C11 C12 C13 C14 C15 C16 C17 C18 C19 C20 C21 C22 C23 C24 C25 C26 C27 C28 C29 C30 C31 C32 C33 C34 C35 C36 C37 C38 C39 C40 C41 C42 C43 C44 C45 C46 C47 C48 C49 C50 C51 C52 C53 C54 C55 C56 C57 C58 C59 C60 C61 C62 C63 C64 C65 C66 C67 C68 C69 C70 C71 C72 C73 C74 C75 C76 C77 C78 C79 C80 C81 C82 C83 C84 C85 C86 C87 C88 C89 C90 C91 C92 C93 C94 C95 C171 C170 C157 C156 C155 C154 C153 C123 C122 C121 C120 C119 C118 C117 C116 C115 C114 C113 C112 C111 C110 C109 C108 C107 C106 C105 C104 C103 C102 C101 C100 C99 C98 C97 C96 C172 C173 C174 C175 C176 C177 C178 C179 C180 C181 C182 C183 C184 C185 C186 C187 C188 C189 C152 C151 C150 C149 C148 C147 C146 C145 C144 C143 C142 C141 C140 C139 C138 C137 C136 C135 C134 C133 C132 C131 C130 C129 C128 C127 C126 C125 C124 C169 C168 C167 C166 C165 C164 C163 C162 C161 C160 C159 C158
